programme.desc: Sidharth and Daveed decide to get rich at any cost, hoping to lead a luxurious life, but they get into some unperceived danger and struggle to set things right.

programme.desc: Kathir decides to change his wayward lifestyle to marry Arukkani and moves to the city. He returns home as a successful restaurant owner but tragedy strikes in Arukkani's life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Rajapattai
programme.desc: Murugan, who aspires to become a villain, comes to the rescue of an orphanage. A mafia headed by a scheming politician, Ranganayaki, wants to buy the orphanage and use it for illegal activities.

programme.title: Arai Enn 305il Kadavul
programme.desc: Two men, who are extremely fed up with their work and non-existent love life, vent their frustration towards God. Affected by their words, He visits them along with a box of power.

programme.title: Bhagavathy
programme.desc: Bagavathi, a tea vendor, has big dreams for his younger brother, Guna. However, when Guna's girlfriend's father kills him, Bagavathi must fight to protect Guna's unborn child.

programme.title: Naai Sekar
programme.desc: Sekar's scientist neighbour is hell-bent on proving that it is possible to alter the DNA of animals & humans. So when Sekar is bit by a dog being experimented on, their traits get swapped. What happens next unfolds as a chaos of fun.

programme.title: Dharma Prabhu
programme.desc: Yama attempts to save an innocent child and accidentally rescues a corrupt politician along with her. Lord Shiva, who is furious about Yama's mistake, gives him an ultimatum to amend the situation.

programme.title: Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kaanom
programme.desc: Prem encounters an accident two days before his wedding ceremony. His head injury causes him to forget the last one year of his life. His friends see to it that he gets married despite his condition.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kaanom
programme.desc: Prem has an accident two days before his wedding ceremony. As a result, he forgets the past one year of his life, causing his friends to help him remember his fiancee and their impending wedding.

programme.title: Vinayaka
programme.desc: Karthik, a cheerful man, starts working for a new company in Hyderabad. There, he falls in love with Kalpana. Unfortunately, Kalpana doesn't feel the same for him.

programme.title: Virudhunagar Sandhippu
programme.desc: A fun loving student is raised by his college principal and falls in love with a girl, but the girl's father wants to take revenge on the principal who was responsible for putting him behind bars.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Manasukkul Mathappu
programme.desc: A man is shattered and loses his sanity after the girl he loves dies. In the mental asylum, his doctor in charge falls in love with him. It remains to be seen if this will pull him out of his insanity.

programme.title: Kanden Seethaiyai
programme.desc: Surendra marries Savitri, an orphan. He meets with an accident and a huge amount is needed to undergo the operation, so Savitri decides to become a surrogate mother to earn money.

programme.title: Kai Kodukkum Kai
programme.desc: Veer marries a blind girl and is disowned by his brother. He rents a room and takes care of his wife. He decides to share the room with a handicapped youth who has a secret agenda of his own.

programme.title: Military
programme.desc: Madhavan is known as Military due to his strict attitude towards his five sisters. However, when he is forced to get his first sister married to a widowed professor, his other sisters alienate him.

programme.title: Guntur Kaaram
programme.desc: A man seeks explanations when his mother asks him to sign a document denying he is her son while she campaigns for office, years after she deserts him and marries again.

programme.title: Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A serial killer known to target prostitutes is on the run. Vikram, a policeman, investigates the case and embarks on a mission to track him down.

programme.title: Yaaruda Mahesh
programme.desc: A couple in love get married and have a child; the wife works and the husband takes care of the kid. The wife's brother, a psychiatrist, plays a trick on the husband so that he becomes more self aware and finds purpose in life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Ezhaiyin Sirippil
programme.desc: Ganesan is a bus driver. Kousalya, the daughter of his boss slowly falls for him. But she is shocked when she sees him being accused by a mentally ill woman who holds him responsible for her state.

programme.title: Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven
programme.desc: A boy who is abandoned by his mother is raised by an army officer. He turns out to be a model patriot and joins the army, but his loyalties come under the scanner when he meets a girl and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Oor Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Rathnavelu loves Rasathi, who is in love with Kannan, brother of Veerapandi, an arch rival of Velu. She is forcefully married to Velu, which invites the death of Kannan and the revenge of his brother.

programme.title: Naayak
programme.desc: An innocent software engineer lands in trouble due to his lookalike, a righteous vigilante. When they become aware of each other's existence, they team up against an evil politician.Cast - Ramcharn, Kajal Agrwal.

programme.title: Thennavan
programme.desc: Thennavan, a successful bureaucrat, is appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of the country by the Prime Minister himself. But his radical plan to fix the electoral system goes wrong.

programme.title: Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Manasukkul Mathappu
programme.desc: A man is shattered and loses his sanity after the girl he loves dies. In the mental asylum, his doctor in charge falls in love with him. It remains to be seen if this will pull him out of his insanity.

programme.title: Kanden Seethaiyai
programme.desc: Surendra marries Savitri, an orphan. He meets with an accident and a huge amount is needed to undergo the operation, so Savitri decides to become a surrogate mother to earn money.

programme.title: Kai Kodukkum Kai
programme.desc: Veer marries a blind girl and is disowned by his brother. He rents a room and takes care of his wife. He decides to share the room with a handicapped youth who has a secret agenda of his own.

programme.title: Military
programme.desc: Madhavan is known as Military due to his strict attitude towards his five sisters. However, when he is forced to get his first sister married to a widowed professor, his other sisters alienate him.

programme.title: Guntur Kaaram
programme.desc: A man seeks explanations when his mother asks him to sign a document denying he is her son while she campaigns for office, years after she deserts him and marries again.

programme.title: Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A serial killer known to target prostitutes is on the run. Vikram, a policeman, investigates the case and embarks on a mission to track him down.

programme.title: Yaaruda Mahesh
programme.desc: A couple in love get married and have a child; the wife works and the husband takes care of the kid. The wife's brother, a psychiatrist, plays a trick on the husband so that he becomes more self aware and finds purpose in life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Ezhaiyin Sirippil
programme.desc: Ganesan is a bus driver. Kousalya, the daughter of his boss slowly falls for him. But she is shocked when she sees him being accused by a mentally ill woman who holds him responsible for her state.

programme.title: Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven
programme.desc: A boy who is abandoned by his mother is raised by an army officer. He turns out to be a model patriot and joins the army, but his loyalties come under the scanner when he meets a girl and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Oor Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Rathnavelu loves Rasathi, who is in love with Kannan, brother of Veerapandi, an arch rival of Velu. She is forcefully married to Velu, which invites the death of Kannan and the revenge of his brother.

programme.title: Naayak
programme.desc: An innocent software engineer lands in trouble due to his lookalike, a righteous vigilante. When they become aware of each other's existence, they team up against an evil politician.Cast - Ramcharn, Kajal Agrwal.

programme.title: Thennavan
programme.desc: Thennavan, a successful bureaucrat, is appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of the country by the Prime Minister himself. But his radical plan to fix the electoral system goes wrong.

programme.title: Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Andha Naal
programme.desc: Andha Naal is a Tamil feature film starring Prem Menon, Mohini and others

programme.title: Siragugal
programme.desc: Valli finds herself alone in London when she discovers that her husband is having an extramarital affair. She is helped by Chandrasekar, who is also going through a troubled relationship.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Vedan
programme.desc: Vijay, a policeman, is on a mission to apprehend Bhoopathy, a criminal. He infiltrates the gang to become his right hand man. But in the bargain, he ends up witnessing the killing of his mentor.

programme.title: Subash
programme.desc: In order to marry the girl he loves, Subash, a good-for-nothing youth, joins the army. When he returns, he learns that his own brother is using corrupt ways to gain power in politics.

programme.title: En Thangachi Padichava
programme.desc: When a police officer gets transferred to a troubled village terrorised by a wealthy landlord, he seeks the help of an ex-convict to seize the tyrant.

programme.title: Ullam Kollai Pogudhey
programme.desc: Anbu, a dubbing artiste, falls in love with his sister's friend Jyothi, who is in love with Gautham. Just when they are about to get married, an accident changes the course of their lives forever.

programme.title: Kovil
programme.desc: Sakthivel and Angel, whose parents are sworn enemies, fall in love with each other. Things take a turn when Angel's father asks her to take her religious vows.

programme.title: Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. It is IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, who has other plans.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. It is IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, who has other plans.

programme.title: Sabash babu
programme.desc: Lalitha becomes extremely disturbed after she loses her newborn child. However, when she meets Babu, an orphan, she finds another reason to live and that is to raise the boy.

programme.title: Enga Annan Varattum
programme.desc: Enga Annan Varattum is a 1990 Indian Tamil film directed by R.Krishna Moorthy. The film, produced by Mohan Natarajan and Tharangai V. Shanmugam

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Kadhal Kirukan
programme.desc: A man is so deeply in love with his childhood friend that he is willing to go to any lengths to protect her, even commit murder.

programme.title: Saval
programme.desc: Brothers Shankar and Raja decide to go to the city for better opportunities post their mother's death. However, they get separated while travelling on a goods train.

programme.title: Idhaya thirudan
programme.desc: A young woman posts her pictures online and emails them to a fictitious address; to her surprise, a person actually exists at the address. They meet and eventually fall in love, but a police officer poses trouble because he is interested in the girl.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Srimati Annapurna Catering
programme.desc: Srimati Annapurna Catering

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Mukkera Meenakshi
programme.desc: Mukkera Meenakshi

programme.title: Sivangi
programme.desc: Born into a humble and rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Sivangi takes it upon herself to leave home and fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely confront the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Srimati Annapurna Catering
programme.desc: Srimati Annapurna Catering

programme.title: Jailer
programme.desc: Tiger Muthuvel Pandian,a retired jailer, is now a family man who leads an ordinary life.Trouble knocks on his door when his son, a diligent cop,investigates an idol smuggling mafia and forces Muthuvel Pandian to step back into the dark world of his past.

programme.title: Dhruva

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Krishna Vamshi
programme.desc: Krishna Vamshi

programme.title: Anu Pallavi
programme.desc: Conflicts arise & emotional bonds form when Pallavi, an IAS officer & single mom of a mischievous daughter encounters Vikranth, a single dad & suspended IAS officer. Together, they navigate parenthood, familial struggles & a second chance at love.

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Madhura Munjana
programme.desc: Madhura Munjana

programme.desc: Movie for Kannada

programme.desc: Cast - Shivarajkumar, Radhika, Deepu

programme.title: Vishnusena
programme.desc: A college professor Jayasimha (Vishnuvardhana) lost his family along with 200 others when his residential apartment collapses due to bad construction. In order to take revenge, he sets up 'Vishnu Sene', a network of his former students working in different offices to fight against corruption

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Balak Gopal
programme.desc: Balak Gopal

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.
